headline: How The Willis Towers Watson (WTW) Narrative Is Shifting With AI And Reset Valuations
summary: Willis Towers Watson’s fair value estimate has been trimmed from US$354.74 to US$334.32, a reduction of about 5.8% in the modeled price target. Analysts link this reset to a mix of caution and renewed confidence, as they weigh AI related disruption risks against the potential for technology to support long term profitability in the insurance broker business. Read on to see how these shifting views are shaping the evolving narrative around the stock and what signals to watch next. Wall...
